summary_en: 1,099,400 shares acquired for ¥1.195B via ToSTNeT-3 on 2026-05-29, completing the buyback program authorized 2026-05-28 (upper limit 1,210,000 shares, ¥1.315B). Program fully executed.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition Results and Completion of Share Buyback via Off-Exchange Purchase Transaction (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief:
Rokko Butter completed its share buyback on 2026-05-29 via off-exchange purchase transaction (ToSTNeT-3). The company acquired 1,099,400 common shares for a total of ¥1.195 billion, representing 5.65% of the authorized limit of 1,210,000 shares (¥1.315 billion upper limit) approved by the board on 2026-05-28.

The buyback program is now fully executed and closed. The company stated that the acquisition was undertaken to strengthen long-term shareholder returns and improve capital efficiency while investing in future business operations, equipment, and human capital development.
